mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, topic, message_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_time, last_error, sent_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag FROM osh_outbox_event WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND status = 0 AND next_retry_time <= NOW() ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_outbox_event SET status = 1, update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0 AND next_retry_time <= NOW() AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_outbox_event SET status = 2, sent_time = NOW(), last_error = NULL, update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0

UPDATE osh_outbox_event SET status = 0, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_outbox_event SET status = 3, last_error = #{lastError}, update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0

UPDATE osh_outbox_event SET status = 0, next_retry_time = NOW(), last_error = CONCAT(IFNULL(last_error, ''), ' | 系统自动恢复超时SENDING事件'), update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 1 AND update_time < #{timeoutTime} AND delete_flag = 0
